title: I’ve wandered far away from God
firstLine: I’ve wandered far away from God,
publicDomainBasis: William James Kirkpatrick (1838–1921), William James Kirkpatrick (1838–1921). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
I’ve wandered far away from God,
Now I’m coming home;
The paths of sin too long I’ve trod,
Lord, I’m coming home.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
I’ve wasted many precious years,
Now I’m coming home;
I now repent with bitter tears,
Lord, I’m coming home.

sections.label: Chorus
Chorus
sections.text:
My soul is sick, my heart is sore,
Now I’m coming home;
My strength renew, my hope restore:
Lord, I’m coming home.

sections.label: Chorus
Chorus
